message:
🌱 Add contour: Please add support for wildcard virtual hosts mission (#1245)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "contour-1228-please-add-support-for-wildcard-virtual-hosts",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "contour: Please add support for wildcard virtual hosts",
+    "description": "Please add support for wildcard virtual hosts. Requested by 7+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current contour deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your contour version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n contour -l app.kubernetes.io/name=contour\nhelm list -n contour 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working contour installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review contour configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant contour configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n contour -l app.kubernetes.io/name=contour\nkubectl get configmap -n contour -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=contour\n```\nHi,\n\nI need multiple virtual host fqdn routed to the same backend service,"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Please add support for wildcard virtual hosts",
+        "description": "Similar to Ingress, Gateway APIs specify hostname matching here: https://gateway-api.sigs.k8s.io/spec/#networking.x-k8s.io/v1alpha1.Listener\n\n```\nHostname specifies the virtual hostname to match for protocol types that define this concept. When unspecified, “”, or *, all hostnames are matched. This field can be omitted for protocols that don’t require hostname based matching.\n\nHostname is the fully qualified domain name of a network host, as defined by RFC 3986. Note the following deviations\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n contour -l app.kubernetes.io/name=contour\nkubectl get events -n contour --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Please add support for wildcard virtual hosts\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Similar to Ingress, Gateway APIs specify hostname matching here: https://gateway-api.sigs.k8s.io/spec/#networking.x-k8s.io/v1alpha1.Listener\n\n```\nHostname specifies the virtual hostname to match for protocol types that define this concept. When unspecified, “”, or *, all hostnames are matched. This field can be omitted for protocols that don’t require hostname based matching.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
